sentences.arabic: شَهِدَتِ الصِّنَاعَةُ الدَّوَائِيَّةُ طَفْرَةً نَوْعِيَّةً مَعَ ظُهُورِ التِّقْنِيَّاتِ الْحَيَوِيَّةِ الَّتِي مَهَّدَتِ الطَّرِيقَ لِعِلَاجَاتٍ أَكْثَرَ دِقَّةً وَفَعَّالِيَّةً.
sentences.translation: Farmaceutska industrija je doživjela kvalitativni skok pojavom biotehnologija koje su utrle put preciznijim i efikasnijim tretmanima.
sentences.translationEn: The pharmaceutical industry has witnessed a qualitative leap with the emergence of biotechnologies that have paved the way for more precise and effective treatments.

sentences.arabic: وَيُعَدُّ الصَّيْدَلِيُّ حَلْقَةَ الْوَصْلِ الْأَسَاسِيَّةَ بَيْنَ الطَّبِيبِ وَالْمَرِيضِ، حَيْثُ يَقُومُ بِمُرَاجَعَةِ الْوَصَفَاتِ لِضَمَانِ عَدَمِ تَعَارُضِ الْأَدْوِيَةِ.
sentences.translation: Farmaceut se smatra osnovnom karikom između ljekara i pacijenta, jer pregleda recepte kako bi osigurao da nema interakcija između lijekova.
sentences.translationEn: The pharmacist is considered the essential link between the doctor and the patient, as they review prescriptions to ensure there are no drug interactions.

sentences.arabic: يُتِيحُ الطِّبُّ الدَّقِيقُ الْآنَ تَفْصِيلَ الْعِلَاجَاتِ بِنَاءً عَلَى الْخَصَائِصِ الْجِينِيَّةِ لِكُلِّ فَرْدٍ، مِمَّا يُقَلِّلُ مِنَ الْآثَارِ الْجَانِبِيَّةِ الضَّارَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Precizna medicina sada omogućava prilagođavanje tretmana na osnovu genetskih karakteristika svakog pojedinca, što smanjuje štetne nuspojave.
sentences.translationEn: Precision medicine now allows for tailoring treatments based on the genetic characteristics of each individual, which reduces harmful side effects.

sentences.arabic: وَمَعَ ذَلِكَ، فَإِنَّ التَّحْذِيرَ مِنْ سُوءِ اسْتِخْدَامِ الْمُضَادَّاتِ الْحَيَوِيَّةِ أَصْبَحَ ضَرُورَةً قُصْوَى لِمُوَاجَهَةِ ظَاهِرَةِ الْمُقَاوَمَةِ الْبَكْتِيرِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Uprkos tome, upozorenje na zloupotrebu antibiotika postalo je krajnja neophodnost u suočavanju s fenomenom bakterijske otpornosti.
sentences.translationEn: Nevertheless, warning against the misuse of antibiotics has become an extreme necessity to confront the phenomenon of bacterial resistance.

sentences.arabic: تَخْضَعُ الْأَدْوِيَةُ الْجَدِيدَةُ لِتَجَارِبَ سَرِيرِيَّةٍ صَارِمَةٍ قَبْلَ اعْتِمَادِهَا، لِلتَّأَكُّدِ مِنْ مُطَابَقَتِهَا لِأَعْلَى مَعَايِيرِ السَّلَامَةِ وَالْجَوْدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Novi lijekovi podliježu strogim kliničkim ispitivanjima prije odobrenja, kako bi se osigurala njihova usklađenost s najvišim standardima sigurnosti i kvaliteta.
sentences.translationEn: New drugs undergo rigorous clinical trials before approval to ensure their compliance with the highest standards of safety and quality.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ التَّطَوُّرَ الْمُسْتَمِرَّ فِي عِلْمِ الصَّيْدَلَةِ يَبْعَثُ عَلَى الْأَمَلِ فِي إِيجَادِ حُلُولٍ جِذْرِيَّةٍ لِلْأَمْرَاضِ الَّتِي كَانَتْ تُعْتَبَرُ مُسْتَعْصِيَةً فِي السَّابِقِ.
sentences.translation: Kontinuirani razvoj farmacije budi nadu u pronalaženje radikalnih rješenja za bolesti koje su se u prošlosti smatrale neizlječivim.
sentences.translationEn: The continuous development in pharmacology gives hope for finding radical solutions to diseases that were previously considered incurable.
